# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — root-context-push-url

AJP root-context with VAADIN_PUSH_URL=/VAADIN/push; PUSH still needs an HTTP/WebSocket proxy since AJP does not carry WebSocket frames.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
<Location />
    ProxyPass               ajp://vaadin:8009/
</Location>

<Location /VAADIN/push>
    ProxyPass               ws://vaadin:8080/VAADIN/push
</Location>

<Location /HILLA/push>
    ProxyPass               ws://vaadin:8080/HILLA/push
</Location>
```
